suppress.notes: jackson-databind contains the general-purpose data-binding functionality and tree-model for Jackson Data Processor. From 2.8.0 until 2.18.9, 2.21.5, and 3.1.4, version 2.22.0 was published on Jun 02, 2026, but still contains the vulnerability. The issue is fixed in 2.22.1, 2.23.0, and 3.2.0. version "tools.jackson.core:jackson-core:3.2.0" will implay code changes and may not be compatible with the current code base. Therefore, we will suppress this CVE for now.
